The '''Demigue Terror''' was a [[Hyperspace route/Legends|trade route]] connecting [[Gascon]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] with the fairly distant world of [[Demigue]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="TEA" /> It was a treacherous route, plagued by [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] and hijackers.

Agents working to recover a [[Ring/Legends|ring]] given by [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Marilla]] of Gascon to her paramour, the [[Prime Minister (Demigue)|Prime Minister]] of Demigue, were forced to take this route in order to recover it in time to prevent the [[Holy Advisor]] from outing her as a philanderess at a ball held by her husband, the King of Gascon.
